nodes.context: International confraternity founded in 1977 at University of Benin, Nigeria; involved in organized crime through its subgroup Black Axe.
Criminal subgroup of the Neo Black Movement of Africa, formed in 1994; involved in organized crime, human trafficking, and money laundering.
Similar confraternity established in 1952; NBM formed as a response to its reported excesses.

edges.context: Black Axe is a criminal subgroup of the Neo Black Movement of Africa, formed in 1994.
NBM formed as a response to the reported excesses of the National Association of Seadogs.
